presentingComplaint: Collapse at work with brief LOC and limb twitching
stickyNote:
'?First fit' is a triage label — read the AMBULANCE sheet. Tongue? Incontinence? Post-ictal?
A first-fit patient should be WELL. BP 100→86 systolic, HR 112→124, SpO2 90–91% RA — who owns these obs?
ECG is not 'nonspecific': TWI V1–V4, ?S1Q3T3. What strains a right heart?
3/52 post hysterectomy (long op) + oral HRT. Trop 89, lactate 3.4.
Syncope + hypotension + RV strain — what's the time-critical treatment question?
